message:
test(wave-25): add 33 tests for encoding + cancel type invariants

encoding.rs: 14 tests covering EncodingError Display/Debug/From/Error,
EncodingStats traits, EncodedSymbol accessors, BlockPlan end(),
compute_repair_count, seed_for_block determinism, pipeline stats/reset.

types/cancel.rs: 19 tests covering CancelKind traits/as_str/Display/Ord,
CancelPhase traits/Ord, CancelWitnessError traits, CancelReason
traits/Default/Display/root_cause/chain_depth/memory_cost,
CancelAttributionConfig cost estimation, CancelWitness validate_transition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
